sentences.text: Thad and Theo had a thin comet on the path.
Theo set a thin planet and Thad got the sun.
Thad and Theo met a thin comet at the shed.
A thin orbit met Thad and Theo on the path.
Thad and Theo set a thin Jupiter in the shed.
Theo had a thin star and Thad had the comet.
A thin Saturn sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad got a thin planet and Theo got the orbit.
Theo and Thad set a thin comet on the path.
A thin Jupiter sat with Thad, Theo, and Beth.
Thad let Theo run a thin ship to the planet.
Theo met a thin orbit and Thad got the sun.
A thin comet sat with Thad and Theo.
Thad and Theo set a thin Saturn with Seth.
Theo and Thad ran a thin orbit at the path.
A thin planet hid with Thad and Theo.
Thad got a thin Mars and Theo got the planet.
A thin orbit ran past Thad with Theo.
Theo had a thin comet and Thad had the orbit.
Thad and Theo met a thin planet at the path.
